channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Royals keep playoff hopes alive with 3-0 win over Seattle
item.description: SANDY, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - In the second to last home game of the season, the Utah Royals kept their playoff hopes alive for another week, beating the Seattle Reign 3-0 off of a Cloe Lacasse hat trick.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Joe Burrow runs for a TD and the Bengals' defense carries them past the Giants, 17-7
item.description: Joe Burrow scored on a career-long 47-yard run on the opening possession, and the Cincinnati Bengals’ defense carried them to a much-needed 17-7 victory over the New York Giants.
item.dc:creator: Tom Canavan, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Dodgers tie postseason mark of 33 straight scoreless innings, top Mets 9-0 in NLCS opener
item.description: Jack Flaherty combined on a three-hitter and Los Angeles Dodgers pitchers tied the postseason record of 33 consecutive scoreless innings by routing the New York Mets 9-0 Sunday night in the NL Championship Series opener.
item.dc:creator: Beth Harris, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Larson dominates at The Roval to lead 3 Hendrick cars into next round of NASCAR playoffs
item.description: CONCORD, N.C. (AP) — When rain disrupted Kyle Larson's bid to complete both the Indianapolis 500 and the Coca-Cola 600 on the same day — leaving him unable to turn a single lap at Charlotte Motor Speedway — he returned to the track determined to put on a show.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Lions pass rusher Aidan Hutchinson needs surgery after injury to left tibia vs. Cowboys
item.description: Detroit Lions defensive end Aidan Hutchinson was carted off the field with a serious injury to his left tibia on a sack of Dallas’ Dak Prescott.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Billy Crystal and Spike Lee take their places at the Hall of Fame as basketball superfans
item.description: Honored for his devotion to a basketball team that doesn't have a Hall of Fame history, Billy Crystal couldn't help but note the irony. The actor is being added to the Naismith Memorial Basketball Hall of Fame’s James F.
item.dc:creator: BRIAN MAHONEY, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Carlos Rodón will start AL Championship Series opener for the Yankees vs. the Guardians
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Carlos Rodón wants to be more like Gerrit Cole when he starts the AL Championship Series opener for the New York Yankees against Cleveland on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Williams throws 4 TDs and TE Kmet handles long snaps for Bears in 35-16 rout of Jaguars in London
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Chicago Bears tight end Cole Kmet faced his biggest fear in football with no notice. In a snap, you might say.
item.dc:creator: KEN MAGUIRE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: New Zealand opens up 3-0 lead over Britain in America’s Cup final after almost crashing
item.description: BARCELONA, Spain (AP) — Emirates Team New Zealand avoided a crash and nailed INEOS Britannia with a penalty as it opened up a 3-0 lead in the first-to-seven wins finals of the America’s Cup on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: JOSEPH WILSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Colorado's Deion Sanders has blunt assessment of son's play in return from arm injury
item.description: Colorado Buffaloes head coach Deion Sanders had a blunt assessment of Shilo Sanders' play in the team's 31-28 loss to Kansas State on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Jannik Sinner beats Novak Djokovic to take Shanghai Masters title, Sabalenka reigns in Wuhan
item.description: SHANGHAI (AP) — Top-ranked Jannik Sinner beat Novak Djokovic in straight sets to win the Shanghai Masters on Sunday, giving the Italian his tour-leading seventh title of the season.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Nussmeier throws late TD passes, No. 13 LSU rallies to beat No. 9 Ole Miss 29-26 in overtime
item.description: BATON ROUGE, La. (AP) — Garrett Nussmeier was in the midst of what the LSU quarterback considered one of the worst games of his career. His last two snaps changed everything.
item.dc:creator: BRETT MARTEL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Middle school cheerleaders burned after coach's 'punishment'
item.description: The eighth graders said they were punished for performing a cheer at a football game their coach didn't want them to do.
item.dc:creator: Julianna Washburn, NewsNation

item.title: Aggies comeback falls short against UNLV, 50-34
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Utah State fell into too big of a hole against UNLV on Friday night, and despite a valiant second half comeback, the Aggies lost their fifth straight game.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Kucherov scores go-ahead goal, two empty-netters to push Lightning past Hurricanes in season opener
item.description: Nikita Kucherov had a third-period hat trick to help the Tampa Bay Lightning beat the Carolina Hurricanes 4-1 in Friday night's season opener for both teams.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Padres vs. Dodgers Game 5: Who will advance to the NLCS?
item.description: PHOTOS: The San Diego Padres and Los Angeles Dodgers will face off in Game 5 of the National League Division Series (NLDS) on Friday, Oct. 11 at Dodger Stadium. The winner of this game will advance to the NLCS, which starts on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Anna Ashcraft, Fox 5

item.title: How to cheer on the Padres for NLDS Game 5
item.description: Fans are still cheering on the San Diego Padres as they take on the Los Angeles Dodgers in Game 5 of the National League Division Series Friday evening, following Wednesday's 8-0 blowout.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: What is the story behind the iconic San Diego Chicken?
item.description: Fifty years ago, an iconic professional mascot emerged in San Diego, clad in bright orange and yellow feathers. For decades since, the San Diego Chicken has captivated fans with his comedic bits and sketches in various venues around the world.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: Fruita Softball wins 13th straight to take home Southwestern League title
item.description: Attention Colorado high school softball teams: you do not want to see the Fruita Monument Wildcats right now.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Nearly 50,000 participate in 2024 Bank of America Chicago Marathon; downtown street closures in place
item.description: The Chicago Marathon will take place on Sunday, October 13, with thousands of runners and spectators expected to attend, and several downtown streets closures already in place.
item.dc:creator: Anna Roberts, WGN 9

item.title: BYU looks to pick up where it left off after bye week
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - It's not ideal to have a bye week while on a five-game winning streak, but #14 BYU needed the rest after getting off to a 5-0 start.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Fruita's Olivia Wirth gets family support on senior night
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—Growing up the youngest of three in a competitive, athletic household, Fruita Monument senior Olivia Wirth learned the value of hard work from her parents and siblings.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Ahead of team's game in London, Bears president says he remains steadfast on proceeding with plans for new lakefront stadium
item.description: WARE, England (AP) — The Bears remain focused on the city’s lakefront as the location for a nearly $5 billion stadium development project, team president and CEO Kevin Warren reiterated Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Whittingham not ready to hand keys over to Wilson yet
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - With so much uncertainty as to when Cam Rising will be able to return at quarterback for the Utah football team, is there a point when head coach Kyle Whittingham will move on from Rising and hand the keys to the offense over to freshman Isaac Wilson? "There is
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Utah HC players understand significance of first NHL game
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - No matter what happens this season, there will never be another first NHL game for the Utah Hockey Club It's just game 1 of 82, but the Utah HC players know how historic tonight's game against the Chicago Blackhawks at the Delta Center will be.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Muggers ripped watch off Dodgers pitcher Walker Buehler's arm, police say
item.description:
Police in California say thieves surrounded Los Angeles Dodgers starting pitcher Walker Buehler last month and ripped a pricey watch off his arm.
Police say the victims were all targets of organized groups who steal high-end watches in large crowds during events.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Padres return to Petco Park in NLDS: What to know before you go
item.description: San Diego Padres fans are ecstatic to welcome back their team to Petco Park for games three and four of the National League Division Series against the Los Angeles Dodgers.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Dawson, Fox 5

item.title: What is Freddie Freeman's status for NLDS Game 3?
item.description: Perhaps the most understated but significant development in Sunday night’s emotionally charged National League Division Series game between San Diego and Los Angeles was the departure of Dodgers first baseman Freddie Freeman.
item.dc:creator: Marc Sternfield, KTLA 5
